title: Ozomelis micrantha
taxonomy: Ozomelis micrantha belongs to the family of flowering plants known as the Cunoniaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants native to the subtropical regions of Australia. Within this family, Ozomelis micrantha is a specific species that has been identified. The classification of Ozomelis micrantha is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, and then into the phylum Magnoliophyta and class Magnoliopsida. It is also classified as an endemic species, meaning it is found only in Australia.
